steps.t: Bingo Boffin is at the Fanged Pit. Spalvi has given you the page of manuscript that Willem Whisker found within Moria, and believes that if you show i…
Spalvi Stout-heart is at the dwarf-camp near the Fanged Pit.
Spalvi gave you a number of leads to follow that might help you collect the lost pages of Bingo's manuscript: 'Merrevail in the Fanged Pit might have …
Spalvi said he would meet you at the Twenty-first Hall after you followed all of his leads.
Bingo is in the Twenty-first Hall, ready to read the manuscript you assembled.
Bingo is in the Twenty-first Hall of Moria. Bingo has finished reading his manuscript, and you should speak with him to see if it helped him regain hi…
Spalvi and Willem Whisker are in the Twenty-first Hall, waiting to see if Bingo has regained his memories.
Bingo is in the Twenty-first Hall of Moria.
